changes.description: Replaced verbose original skill (v1.1.0) with targeted v3.0.0 for DeepSeek-V3.2. Key changes: (1) Removed consultation framework and assessment questions irrelevant to extraction tasks. (2) Added explicit formatting rules for enumerations as full URLs, numeric prices/ratings. (3) Added concrete JSON-LD examples for FAQPage and Product schemas matching task patterns. (4) Added validation checklist. (5) Removed references/schema-examples.md file (not needed with inline examples). (6) Emphasized pure JSON output without script tag wrappers.
